_comment: Selection strategy for which paper to display each day
_rotation_comment: Cycles through these one per day. Used when selection='rotate'
_fixed_comment: Always show this paper. Used when selection='fixed'
_orientation_comment: landscape (2880x2160) or portrait (2160x2880). Newspapers fit better in portrait.
_fit_mode_comment: contain (letterbox, preserve full page) or cover (crop to fill)
